title: Disable Mace Crafting
description: A datapack that disable the crafting recipe of the most powerful weapon in the game
body:
## No Maces!
This datapack disables the crafting recipe of the mace, making your server safe from one tapping mace spammers.
![maceno](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a334a5edd7ea6e6a13b6ac77b5e68abf190d3ab7.png)

This datapack **works for all versions that have the mace** and is very simple and lightweight.

### **_Breach swapping is no more!_**
